title: OpenMuCF muon-cost ledger row
description: One published/derived muon-production energy cost, normalized to a single auditable basis with full provenance. Each row of data/muon_cost.csv must satisfy this. This is a curated compilation with provenance, not an evaluation: every OURS-normalization step is shown verbatim in 'derivation', facility rows are original derivations labeled 'implied, derived here', and no accounting credit (e.g. recapture) is ever silently folded in.

citation.description: Human-readable source citation (public: by author/venue/DOI, never by acquisition route).

tier.description: T1 = purpose-built muon-source design studies; T2 = demonstrated technology (e.g. muon-collider front end, collected-not-stopped); T3 = operating facilities (GeV/stopped-mu is OUR derivation, no facility reports it).

basis_as_published.description: The quantity as the source states it (per pi-, per created mu, per stopped mu, per collected mu; beam vs wall-plug). The single normalized basis lives in normalized_GeV_per_stopped_mu; this records what the source actually reports.

recapture_credit_applied.description: True iff an accounting recapture/breeding credit is folded into normalized_GeV_per_stopped_mu. Kelly's x2.5 is such a credit and is kept SEPARATE (applied=false, factor in recapture_factor); a credit is never silently folded into the normalized value.

recapture_factor.description: The recapture/breeding credit factor if the source quotes one (e.g. Kelly x2.5); recorded even when recapture_credit_applied=false, so the credit is visible but not folded in. Empty if none.

eta_acc_assumption.description: Accelerator/wall-plug efficiency the source assumes, if stated (e.g. Kelly 0.18 PSI-measured). The normalized basis is BEAM energy per muon; wall-plug = normalized / eta_acc. Kept separate, never folded. Empty if the source does not state one.

value_as_published.description: The verbatim published value + unit (kept as text because sources report heterogeneous quantities).

normalized_GeV_per_stopped_mu.description: THE single auditable basis: beam (kinetic) energy per muon in GeV, per stopped muon where the source reports stopping (per produced/collected where it does not; see basis_as_published + derivation). NOT wall-plug (eta_acc separate). Empty ONLY for a needs_verification row whose digit is not pinned from the primary text.

derivation.description: Every OURS-normalization step VERBATIM: 'implied, derived here: <formula with numbers>' for facility/derived rows; 'as-published; no OURS-normalization' where the row is copied straight from the source.

needs_verification.description: True iff the muon-cost digit is not pinned from the primary text (paywalled/not in hand). A needs_verification row may never headline anything (I3).
